Class Java.SystemPropertyNode

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.java.Java.SystemPropertyNode
Enclosing class:
Java
private static class Java.SystemPropertyNode extends Object
Represents a node in the hierarchical tree of system properties.
Author:
anahata

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    (package private) Map<String, Java.SystemPropertyNode>
    children
    The children of this node, keyed by their segment name.
    (package private) String
    fullPath
    The full dot-separated path to this node (e.g., "java.vendor").
    (package private) String
    segment
    The segment name of this node (e.g., "java").
    (package private) Object
    value
    The value of the property, if this is a leaf node.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SystemPropertyNode(String segment, String fullPath)
    Constructs a new node.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    (package private) boolean
    isLeaf()
    Checks if this node is a leaf (has no children).

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • segment

      String segment
      The segment name of this node (e.g., "java").

    • fullPath

      String fullPath
      The full dot-separated path to this node (e.g., "java.vendor").

    • value

      Object value
      The value of the property, if this is a leaf node.

    • children

      Map<String, Java.SystemPropertyNode> children
      The children of this node, keyed by their segment name.

  • Constructor Details

    • SystemPropertyNode

      SystemPropertyNode(String segment, String fullPath)
      Constructs a new node.
      Parameters:
      segment - The segment name.
      fullPath - The full path.

  • Method Details

    • isLeaf

      boolean isLeaf()
      Checks if this node is a leaf (has no children).
      Returns:
      true if it's a leaf.
